name: mockstream-desktop
description: Electron desktop client for the Mock Stream exam platform (Windows + macOS).

scripts.dist:bek: npm run runner:bek && cross-env FLAVOR=bek electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.bek.yml
scripts.release:bek: npm run dist:bek && cross-env RELEASE_BUCKET=gs://bekzods-desktop-releases RELEASE_PREFIX=Bekzods-Setup node scripts/upload-release.mjs
scripts.dist:record: npm run runner:record && cross-env FLAVOR=record electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.record.yml
scripts.release:record: npm run dist:record && cross-env RELEASE_BUCKET=gs://multilevelrecord-desktop-releases RELEASE_PREFIX=MultilevelRecord-Setup node scripts/upload-release.mjs
